title: euphrasia crassiuscula subsp. glandulifera
intro: Euphrasia crassiuscula subsp. glandulifera, also known as the glandular-hairy eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia crassiuscula plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia crassiuscula subsp. glandulifera include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes and skin, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Euphrasia crassiuscula subsp. glandulifera can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
